name: feature.podcasts.agents
description: Podcasts feature agent pack (ADR 0086 Phase 4) — a feature-bound manifest agent that helps a user PLAN a multi-speaker audio episode from a research notebook: shaping the briefing, proposing the cast (1–4 speakers + personas), segment count, and outline angle. Advisory by design — the actual generation is an RBAC-gated async executor run triggered from the Podcast Studio (or POST /podcasts/episodes), not a chat write, which keeps the generation behind workspace:write and off the chat injection surface. Chat-drivability = agent + nodes (ADR 0058); this agent reuses the notebook grounding tools to discuss the source material.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Podcast Producer
agents.description: A producer who helps plan a multi-speaker audio episode from a research notebook — the briefing, the cast (1–4 speakers with distinct personas/voices), the segment count, and the outline angle. Grounds the plan on the notebook's sources via feature.notebooks.nodes.ask / .search, then guides the user to generate the episode from the Podcast Studio (an async, workspace:write run). Tools are allowlisted to the notebook grounding surface only.
